arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal and Man United officials watch over Benfica defender Carreras
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United had scouts in attendance at the Taca da Liga final between SL Benfica and Sporting CP watching over Alvaro Carreras. The final was held at Estadio Dr. Magalhaes Pessoa in Leiria, where Benfica claimed victory after a dramatic penalty shootout following a 1-1 draw. After the contest, Portuguese outlet O Jogo […] The post Report: Arsenal and Man United officials watch over Benfica defender Carreras appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Arsenal host Manchester United in the FA Cup
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim's Man United side head to north London for their FA Cp third round clash against Arsenal. ESPN has updates.

arts.ttl: Amorim rewards Garnacho with Arsenal chance amid Napoli interest: ‘He deserves it’
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has rewarded Alejandro Garnacho with a start in Manchester United’s FA Cup clash...

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs. Man United: Red Devils head coach Ruben Amorim drops transfer hint with selection for FA Cup showdown
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim says that Amad Diallo is not in the starting XI against Arsenal in the FA Cup due to "a little problem".

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Man United TV channel - How to watch, BBC iPlayer live stream, kick-off time - football.london
arts.sum: Not only does that curse need to be lifted if Arsenal are to give themselves the best chance of winning silverware this season, a win would be much appreciated by the north London faithful following Tuesday's Carabao Cup semi-final first leg defeat against Newcastle United. In the UK, the FA Cup match between Arsenal and United will be available to watch live on BBC One, BBC iPlayer and through the BBC Sport website.

arts.ttl: Arsenal explain Riccardo Calafiori absence from Man United clash as Tottenham fear emerges
arts.sum: Arsenal are without Riccardo Calafiori for Sunday's FA Cup clash with Manchester United due to a muscle injury, the Gunners confirm.

arts.ttl: Why Amad is on the bench for Manchester United vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Amad is a surprise absentee from the starting XI for Man United's clash with Arsenal in the FA Cup third round.

arts.ttl: Manchester United starting XI vs Arsenal confirmed as Amad on bench but Garnacho starts
arts.sum: Man United will be looking to keep their hopes of defending their FA Cup crown alive when they face Arsenal at the Emirates Stadium on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: FA Cup draw LIVE as Man City and Manchester United discover fourth round opponents
